name: WorldModels Unified Pipeline v3 (with Abuse Guard)

parameters.text:
=### WORLDMODELS EXTRACTOR v22 ###
TEXT: "{{ $json.texto_limpio }}"

1. CATEGORY: 
- "plaza": Agency ADS, Model Tours, Work opportunities.
- "evento": Parties, bookings.
- "trash": Spam, personal chats, INDIVIDUAL ESCORTS PROMOTING THEMSELVES.

IF VALID:
2. TITLE: max 5 words.
3. TRANSLATIONS: Translate full text to Spanish, English, Russian, Portuguese.
4. CITY: Precise city.

JSON SCHEMA:
{
  "city": "City",
  "budget": "Value",
  "category": "plaza|evento|trash",
  "title_es": "...", "text_es": "...",
  "title_en": "...", "text_en": "...",
  "title_ru": "...", "text_ru": "...",
  "title_pt": "...", "text_pt": "...",
  "contact": "Phone",
  "trash": boolean
}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  isGroup: true,
  platform: $json.platform,
  contact: $json.contact || $json.final_contact,
  remoteJid: $json.platform === 'WhatsApp' ? $json.source_chat_id : ($json.source_chat_id + '@g.us'),
  city: $json.city,
  location: $json.city,
  budget: $json.budget,
  category: $json.category === 'evento' ? 'CAT_EVENTOS' : 'CAT_PLAZAS',
  text_es: ($json.text_es || '').replace(/cocina/gi, 'area de servicio'),
  title_es: $json.title_es,
  text_en: $json.text_en,
  title_en: $json.title_en,
  text_ru: $json.text_ru,
  title_ru: $json.title_ru,
  text_pt: $json.text_pt,
  title_pt: $json.title_pt
} }}
